notes: Cross-session memory for AV Intelligence Digest Agent v8.5

ongoing_stories.headline: China nationwide AV permit freeze
ongoing_stories.last_status: Active Day 43 as of 2026-06-10. No resumption timeline. Three stress tests mandated not completed. MIIT/MOT sources offline.

ongoing_stories.headline: Apollo Go outage trigger date RESOLVED 2026-06-08
Waymo NHTSA recall 3791 vehicles flooding defect
ongoing_stories.last_status: Open Day 29 as of 2026-06-10. Permanent remedy in development. San Antonio and Atlanta paused. No new update June 10.

ongoing_stories.headline: Waymo freeway ride suspension construction zone edge cases
ongoing_stories.last_status: Ongoing Day 20 as of 2026-06-10. All freeway rides suspended SF LA PHX MIA. Surface streets operational. Resumption soon per Waymo spokesperson. No new update June 10.

ongoing_stories.headline: Apollo Go Wuhan service shutdown ongoing post-outage
ongoing_stories.last_status: Commercial operations still suspended as of 2026-06-10. Elderly Week social welfare rides June 7-11 Wuhan Hongshan District concluded. No official Baidu/MIIT resumption statement. conflict_age_days 14. ESCALATED HIGH PRIORITY.
ongoing_stories.conflicting_data: Version A fully shut down: Automotive World/CNBC Score 4. Version B limited social welfare activity: apollogo.com Tier 1 June 7-11 Elderly Week Wuhan Hongshan District Score 5. Working conclusion: commercial operations still suspended; Elderly Week was not commercial resumption. HIGH PRIORITY. conflict_age_days 14. ESCALATED.
status_change_triggers: Tier 1-3 source confirming full commercial operations

ongoing_stories.headline: Waymo Ojai US Senate scrutiny of Zeekr/Geely manufacturing partnership
ongoing_stories.last_status: Active as of 2026-06-10 Day 14 unchanged. No new Senate action. conflict_age_days 14. HIGH PRIORITY. ESCALATED.
ongoing_stories.conflicting_data: No confirmed Senate hearing date. conflict_age_days 14. HIGH PRIORITY. ESCALATED.

ongoing_stories.headline: 17 EU transport ministers sign cross-border AV testing declaration
ongoing_stories.last_status: Signed June 8. EUR 20M CEF funding announced for digital AV infrastructure. 17 signatory nations. All four monitored companies named as active in signatory nations. No implementation timeline.

ongoing_stories.headline: Waymo vs Wayve/Uber London robotaxi competition intensifies
ongoing_stories.last_status: Uber Wayve public waiting list opened June 8. Waymo testing 100 vehicles 100 sq miles London. UK regulatory framework pending H2 2026. TechCrunch coverage June 8 2026.

ongoing_stories.headline: Waymo vehicle obstructs emergency response Dallas apartment explosion
ongoing_stories.last_status: Incident June 4 2026. No regulatory investigation announced. Under media scrutiny. No change June 10.

ongoing_stories.headline: Waymo acquires Apple 5500-acre AV proving ground Wittmann Arizona $220M
ongoing_stories.last_status: Sale recorded June 5 2026 reported June 8-9. 5500 acres including city course, dynamics area, 4-mile oval, freeway course. Purchased from Route 14 Investment Partners (Apple shell entity). Apple paid $125M in 2021.
status_change_triggers: Facility operational for Waymo testing announced
Permanent recall remedy linked to new test facility

ongoing_stories.headline: Bolt, Pony.ai and Stellantis launch Luxembourg Level 4 autonomous mobility testing program
ongoing_stories.last_status: Announced June 9 2026. 5 Gen-7 vehicles. Testing starts Bissen, expanding to Luxembourg City over 12 months. Targets fully driverless readiness by program end.

ongoing_stories.headline: Slovak PM Fico meets WeRide, signals support for multi-product L4 AV deployment
ongoing_stories.last_status: Meeting June 10 2026 Bratislava. First vehicle batch arriving June 2026. Testing Bratislava then Kosice and High Tatras. Commercial operations 2026 target.
